sizing_rule.note: Dynamic fractional f based on Ralph Vince scenario analysis with 20% kelly weighting. Reallocate quarterly when inequality equation satisfied. Three scenarios: worst case (50% prob, -100% loss), neutral (25% prob), best case (25% prob). Max drawdown tolerance 50%.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f position sizing and reallocate on a quarterly basis when the equation 1.005^n <= 1.01933^n*.2+1-.2 is satisfied, allowing for continuous optimization of active equity based on scenario probability analysis.
